title: Meta AI will offer broader real-time international news and content
description: Meta AI will now offer a broader range of real-time content including global news, entertainment, and lifestyle stories across apps and devices.

title: Launch HN: Kita (YC W26) — Automate credit review in emerging markets with VLMs
description: Uses VLM-based agents to parse documents, detect fraud, and extract underwriting signals from messy financial files. 55 points.

title: TaxHacker — Self-hosted AI accounting app with LLM analyzer
description: Self-hosted AI accounting app. LLM analyzer for receipts, invoices, transactions with custom prompts and categories. 136 stars today.

title: The best AI investment might be in energy tech
description: Power has become one of the biggest bottlenecks in rolling out new AI data centers, creating an opening for investors.

title: OpenAI is throwing everything into building a fully automated researcher
description: OpenAI sets 'AI researcher' as its new north star — a fully automated agent system. Plans autonomous research intern by September, full multi-agent system by 2028. Exclusive interview with chief scientist Jakub Pachocki.
